userText: I took the initiative to learn AI when the company adopt GitHub Copolit.
correctedText: I took the initiative to learn AI when the company adopted GitHub Copilot.

issues.note: 'the company adopt' → 'the company adopted'; when-clause referring to a past event requires past tense
issues.suggestion: When describing a past trigger/event in a when-clause, use simple past: 'when they adopted / launched / introduced'
